varieties.name: Generic Piper betle
varieties.traits: Evergreen climbing vine to 3m; glossy heart-shaped leaves 8-12cm; adventitious roots at nodes
varieties.availability: RARE in humid subtropical climates. Available from specialist online nurseries: Shaman Australis, Seeds of India. Not stocked by mainstream Queensland nurseries.

varieties.name: Venmony Vettila (HEIRLOOM, INDIGENOUS)
varieties.origin: Venmony village near Chengannur, tropical monsoon climates (100+ years history)
varieties.traits: Premium quality; large size 12-16cm; glossy dark green; smooth texture
varieties.availability: Local tropical monsoon climates nurseries, Greens of tropical monsoon climates (online), traditional farmers in Venmony/Chengannur region

varieties.name: Standard Piper sarmentosum
varieties.traits: Perennial groundcover; creeping stems 40-60cm; spreads via rhizomes; heart-shaped glossy leaves 8-10cm
varieties.availability: EXCELLENT in humid subtropical climates. Widely available: Daleys Fruit Tree Nursery, Garden Express, Food Forest Seeds Australia, Mudbrick Herb Cottage, All Rare Herbs, Green Harvest, Rareplants, Fruitopia Nursery, Fair Dinkum Seeds, Edible Jungle Nursery
